name: dusty room
hints: A dusty room with a stone door. The dust itself is collectible and the door may lead somewhere.
GET DUST - magical dust may be useful. The stone door may require a spell or key to open. A stone staircase leads down.
GET DUST for use with spells. The stone door connects to deeper areas. WEST returns to the plain room. The staircase leads DOWN to the cavern areas.
notes: Dusty room accessed by PUSH EAST from the plain room (10). Has a stone door and collectible dust. West returns to room 10. Connected to the stone staircase (room 25) and deeper cavern areas.
